Meta.title: GraceBridge — Ministry Support Platform
Meta.description: A multilingual platform that helps pastors prepare sermons and helps believers understand Scripture.

Landing.heroTagline: An AI sermon partner for pastors
Landing.heroTitle: Lighten the load of preparation, and dwell deeper in the Word
Landing.heroSubtitle: GraceBridge is a multilingual ministry platform that helps pastors prepare sermons and helps believers understand Scripture more clearly.
Landing.feature1Desc: Choose the passage, season, audience, and length, and build the framework of your sermon from outline to application questions.
Landing.feature2Desc: Browse slides, videos, and resources organized by the structure of all 66 books of the Bible.
Landing.feature3Desc: Korean, English, French, Spanish, German. Both the interface and generated content are multilingual.
Landing.disclaimer: AI-generated content on this platform is a reference to aid sermon preparation. Please complete your final sermon through prayer, meditation, and theological review.

Auth.pastorNote: When you register as a pastor, full features such as the sermon writer become available after administrator approval. Until then, you have member access.
Auth.signupSuccess: Registration complete. Please check your email.

Sermon.title: AI Sermon Writer
Sermon.subtitle: Choose the passage, season, audience, and length to build your sermon's framework.
Sermon.extrasPlaceholder: e.g. mention the church's 30th anniversary; include comfort for a recent local disaster
Sermon.disclaimer: AI-generated content in this service is a reference to aid sermon preparation. Please complete your final sermon through prayer, meditation, and theological review.
Sermon.limitReached: You've used all of today's generations. Please try again tomorrow.
Sermon.loginRequired: The sermon writer is available after signing in.
Sermon.pastorOnly: Full sermon generation is available to approved pastor accounts. Member accounts can preview it in summary mode.
Sermon.needScripture: Please enter at least one Scripture passage.
Sermon.generateError: An error occurred while generating. Please try again shortly.

Library.title: Scripture Library
Library.subtitle: Browse slides, videos, and resources organized by the 66 books of the Bible.
Library.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, book, or topic
Library.noContentInBook: No content has been added to this book yet.

Devotion.title: Today's Devotion
Devotion.notReady: Today's devotion is not ready yet.

QA.title: Bible Q&A
QA.subtitle: Ask anything about Scripture.
QA.placeholder: Type your question about the Bible
QA.disclaimer: AI answers are for reference. Please consult your pastor for important matters of faith.
QA.loginRequired: Bible Q&A is available after signing in.
QA.empty: Ask a question, e.g. What is the heart of the Sermon on the Mount?
QA.limitReached: You've used all of today's questions.
QA.error: An error occurred while answering. Please try again shortly.

Errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
Errors.notAuthorized: You do not have permission to access this page.
